system_prompt: You are an expert DevOps engineer and Node.js developer. You have been dropped into a Linux container with a broken Express.js backend in /app. Your goal is to diagnose and fix bugs so the app runs correctly. Respond ONLY with a JSON object: {"command": "<bash command>"}. Use standard bash/Linux commands. Do NOT use interactive editors (vi, nano). Be methodical: read files first, understand the bug, then fix it.

tasks.description: Fix the port configuration bug so the app starts on port 3000 and /health returns HTTP 200.
expected_bugs: config.json has port set to 9999 instead of 3000

verifiers.name: Config Port Fixed
verifiers.description: Ensures config.json has port set to 3000

tasks.description: Fix the port config AND the syntax error in routes/users.js so /api/users returns valid JSON.
hints: Look for syntax errors in routes/users.js — missing closing parenthesis
expected_bugs: config.json has port set to 9999 instead of 3000
routes/users.js is missing a closing parenthesis on the router.get() call

verifiers.name: Config Port Fixed
verifiers.description: Ensures config.json has port set to 3000

verifiers.name: Syntax Error Fixed
verifiers.description: routes/users.js has closing parenthesis on router.get

verifiers.name: Users Endpoint Responds
verifiers.description: GET /api/users returns HTTP 200 with users array

tasks.description: Fix ALL three bugs: port config, syntax error, and missing await in the async data handler.
hints: Look for syntax errors that prevent startup
Watch out for async/await issues in routes/data.js
expected_bugs: config.json has port set to 9999 instead of 3000
routes/users.js is missing a closing parenthesis on the router.get() call
routes/data.js is missing 'await' before fetchDataFromDB() causing a pending Promise

verifiers.name: Config Port Fixed
verifiers.description: Ensures config.json has port set to 3000

verifiers.name: Users Endpoint
verifiers.description: GET /api/users returns valid JSON with users

verifiers.name: Data Endpoint
verifiers.description: GET /api/data returns valid JSON with records
